relationships: ber:Sami yella yekṛeh ad yeqqim deg uɣerbaz mi ara fakent tezrawin
ber:Ziri yeqqim ur as-igir yiwen tamawt deg tneɣrit
ber:Yanni yeqqim yettxebbir Skura ɣef wayen ay d-yellan d amaynu
ber:Lukas yeqqim yettxemmim ɣef tigawin-nnes i d-itteddun
ber:Tobias yekka amur ameqqran seg wass-nni netta yeqqim din
ber:Ziri yeqqim kra yekka wass netta yettḍafar Rima
ber:Asafag n Tom yeqqim la iɣelli deg tegriwelt war ma yessaweḍ ad t-yeḥkem
ber:D isragen i yeqqim netta yessawal ɣef turarin
ber:Ziri yeqqim din gar kraḍt d kuẓet n tmikin din
ber:Yanni yeqqim kra yekka wass netta ixeddem aya
ber:Michael yeqqim d iseggasen netta iḥemmel Linda
